//permissions: READ-ONLY profile (settings-setup Q2=B): common read-only commands auto-approved; writes, installs, network, and state-changing git still prompt (Q1=B — ask before each git write). deny baseline blocks secrets + rm -rf. git rev-parse stays allowed so the memory hook runs unprompted.
//hooks: SessionStart preflight, both Node (identical on Windows/macOS/Linux): (1) ensure-repo-memory self-heals this machine's auto-memory to the repo's .claude/memory (idempotent); (2) ensure-python verifies a usable Python 3 is on PATH (this project carries Python skills) — quiet on success, advisory on a miss, never blocks. See docs/skill-dependencies.md.
